heading: Reference to chapters 1003, 1005, and 1007
label: 241 Reference to chapters 1003, 1005, and 1007
text: Provisions of law relating to the reserve components generally, including provisions relating to the organization and administration of the reserve components, are set forth in chapter 1003 (beginning with section 10101), chapter 1005 (beginning with section 10141), and chapter 1007 (beginning with section 10201) of this title.
notes: Amendments2016— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–328section 261 of this title
